name: profiles/active.sh validates a profile yaml against the profile system contract before activation
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: invalid-severity\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --validate profiles/p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_severity' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
